name: Fluttershy [Rise and Shine]
description:
As the sun begins to peek through the curtains of Fluttershy's cozy cottage, you enter her room, waking her up to start the day. Little did you know, you’re about to encounter the sleepy pony in all her morning glory.

[All Ponies are 20+]

[Art Credit: hooves-art]
